Title: Frank E. Downs. Trip to Nome, Alaska, May to Sept. 1900: Dutch Harbor, taken from old Russian military cemetery looking north to two settlements, one back of hills. Olympia could not get through ice 600 miles north and had to put back here for water; Dutch Harbor (?) view.
